# @hosaka-fm/crate

> Official typed TypeScript client for the crate public API — a cluster-first music-catalogue
> aggregation gateway keyed on `cluster_id`. The artist is the root; `master` and `bandcamp` are
> dimensions of the artist dossier (`discography`, `bandcamp_emergence`, `bandcamp_tastemaker`).
> Artist / label / festival dossiers, resolve, search, breakouts, tastemakers. Key-first: every
> data endpoint needs an `apiKey` (`X-API-Key`); only `crate.index()` is keyless. Auto-retry on
> 429/5xx, typed teaching errors, sparse `?fields=`. Node 18+, dual ESM+CJS, zero runtime deps.
> Targets crate `/api/v2`.

## Start here

- [README](./README.md): install, quick start, full client surface, errors, configuration.
- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md): the machine-first contract for AI agents.

## Guides

- [Getting started](./docs/getting-started.md): first call in 60 seconds.
- [Authentication](./docs/authentication.md): the three auth tiers (anon / key / beacon).
- [Errors](./docs/errors.md): typed exceptions, `kind`/`code`, the HTTP-status map, `toJSON`.
- [AI agents](./docs/ai-agents.md): forgiving inputs, branch-on-code, runtime discovery.
- [Recipes](./docs/recipes.md): copy-paste, single-capability snippets.
- [Configuration](./docs/configuration.md): retries, timeouts, deadlines, custom `fetch`.

## Runnable examples (type-checked in CI)

- [quickstart](./examples/quickstart.ts), [error-handling](./examples/error-handling.ts),
  [cancellation](./examples/cancellation.ts), [discovery](./examples/discovery.ts),
  [agent](./examples/agent.ts).

## Runtime contract

- Cluster-first: `cluster_id` is the prime key. The artist dossier carries `discography` (a pointer
  index of masters), `bandcamp_emergence`, and `bandcamp_tastemaker`. Labels are first-class.
- Branch on `err.kind` then `err.code`; never parse messages. `err.hint` + `err.next` carry the fix.
- `JSON.stringify(err)` is lossless for handoff. The SDK already retries 429/5xx — do not double-retry.
- `null` (HTTP 200 `present:false`) is an honest gap, not an error. Opaque ids are strings.
- `artist()` is default-rich; pass `{ fields: [...] }` only to trim. Unknown field → `400 invalid_fields`.
- Discover the surface from `crate.index()`, `CRATE_RESOURCES`, and `CRATE_ERROR_REGISTRY`.
